overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character riding a horse through open grasslands, dismounting to walk alongside the horse briefly, then remounting to continue riding. The scene is illuminated by a lantern attached to the character, casting dramatic warm light across the tall grass and trees under a dark starry sky.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through tall grass toward a large ancient tree, holding a lantern that illuminates the path ahead

notable_agents.action: horse walking steadily through the tall grass with rider mounted

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches silhouetted against the night sky
dense tall grass illuminated by the lantern light, swaying slightly as the horse moves through it
narrow dirt path cutting through the grass, barely visible in the darkness
cluster of oak trees with autumn foliage scattered across the prairie landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on horseback moving through a dark grassland at night. A massive ancient tree dominates the center of the frame ahead, while scattered oak trees dot the horizon. The only light comes from the lantern carried by the character, creating a small pool of warm yellow illumination on the tall grass and dirt trail.

events.description: character dismounts the horse and begins walking alongside it while leading it forward

agents.ego_description: walking on foot alongside the horse, leading it by the reins through the grass near a fence line

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly beside the character, matching their pace

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts running parallel to the path, marking a property boundary
large rock formation visible on the horizon against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character dismounts and walks alongside the horse through the grassland. A wooden fence line appears on the right, running parallel to their path. The large ancient tree from the previous segment falls behind them as they progress along the dirt trail, with the lantern light revealing the texture of the grass and the horse's coat.

events.description: character remounts the horse and resumes riding through the open field

agents.ego_description: riding the horse again through open grassland, moving away from the tree line toward distant hills

notable_agents.action: horse trotting through the tall grass with rider mounted, tail swaying

entered.detail: expansive open prairie stretching to the horizon with minimal tree cover
low rolling hill silhouetted against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character remounts the horse and rides off into the open prairie. The fence line and rock outcrop fall behind as the landscape opens up into expansive grassland. The lantern continues to illuminate the path ahead, revealing the undulating terrain and scattered trees while the horse moves at a steady trot through the tall grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark nighttime grassland that transitions from a sheltered wooded area into an expansive open prairie. It begins by following a rider on horseback toward a massive ancient tree, with a lantern casting a small pool of warm yellow light across the dirt trail and tall grass. As the character dismounts to walk alongside the horse, the ancient tree recedes into the background and a wooden fence line emerges on the right to guide their path. The scene then shifts as the character remounts, leaving the fence and a nearby rock outcrop behind while the landscape opens up into a wide, undulating grassland. Finally, the camera tracks the horse at a steady trot, with the lantern light revealing scattered trees and the vast terrain under a dark sky.
